properties.name: Inflatable World Cookstown
properties.description: A massive indoor arena filled with bouncy castles, slides, and obstacles. Perfect for burning off energy on a rainy day.

properties.name: Wee Adventurers Play Hub
properties.description: A focused play center in Cookstown designed for younger children to explore and learn through play.

properties.name: Happy Dayz
properties.description: A popular soft play center with a large multi-level frame, slides, and a dedicated toddler area.

properties.name: Duff Land
properties.description: A family-run adventure farm and indoor play area featuring animals and plenty of space to run around.

properties.name: Mini Minds Play Cafe
properties.description: A unique role-play cafe where children can use their imaginations while parents enjoy a coffee nearby.

properties.name: High Rise Lisburn
properties.description: A high-spec adventure center with climbing walls and a huge multi-story soft play area.

properties.name: Little Izzie's Play Cafe
properties.description: A cozy play cafe perfect for younger children, featuring role-play areas and great snacks for the adults.

properties.name: Nature and Nurture
properties.description: A beautiful sensory-focused play center designed to be a calm and engaging environment for little ones.

properties.name: Andersonstown Leisure Centre
properties.description: Home to 'Surf Belfast' and a fantastic indoor water park with slides that the whole family will love.

properties.name: Little Play Studio
properties.description: A creative and imaginative role-play studio where kids can pretend to be doctors, chefs, or shopkeepers.

properties.name: Roar and Explore
properties.description: Belfast City Zoo's own indoor soft play. A fun, animal-themed adventure for kids to enjoy after seeing the zoo.

properties.name: W5
properties.description: Ireland's award-winning science and discovery center. Interactive exhibits for kids of all ages.

properties.name: Dobbies Garden Centre Lisburn
properties.description: Includes a great little indoor soft play area and a family-friendly restaurant perfect for a quick stop.

properties.name: Honeybees Playtown
properties.description: An imaginative role-play center where children can learn and explore in a miniature version of a real town.

properties.name: The Wee Village
properties.description: A charming role-play village located in Antrim, designed specifically for toddlers and young children.

properties.name: Global Adventure Play LTD
properties.description: A massive soft play and laser tag arena with multi-story frames and exciting slides.

properties.name: The Imaginarium
properties.description: A sensory-rich environment for children to explore through art, light, and creative play.

properties.name: Twig & Tumble
properties.description: A modern and clean soft play area in Enniskillen with a lovely cafe for parents.

properties.name: Playaway
properties.description: A well-established soft play center in Portadown with frames for different age groups.

properties.name: The Hive
properties.description: An indoor adventure center featuring soft play, sensory areas, and role-play zones.

properties.name: The Sensory Xperience
properties.description: A dedicated sensory space designed for children with additional needs, offering a safe and stimulating environment.

properties.name: Airtastic Craigavon
properties.description: A massive entertainment hub featuring a trampoline park, ninja course, and soft play area.

properties.name: The Jet Centre
properties.description: The ultimate rainy day spot: bowling, cinema, mini-golf, and a huge 'Alley Cats' soft play area.

properties.name: R Crawford & Co
properties.description: A family-friendly hardware and lifestyle store that surprisingly houses a lovely little soft play and cafe upstairs!
